scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix BE" "npm run start --prefix FE"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix BE" "npm run start --prefix FE"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix BE && npm install --prefix FE
